description: Extract text from a document in a specific format (PDF, DOCX, CSV, text).

tools.description:
Extracts clean text (and table text) from a document file: PDF, DOCX, CSV, TXT, MD, or JSON.

When to use: Use when the user asks to read, parse, extract, summarize, or ingest a document, PDF, Word doc, CSV, or text file. Accepts input three ways: an AIDP `source_uri`, raw `content_base64` bytes, or inline `content` text. Optionally writes results to `dest_uri`.

How to discover inputs: Prefer the unified `source_uri` form (`master:<catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/<path>` or `workspace:/<path>`) over legacy catalog/schema/volume name fields. If the user hasn't named a file, FIRST call CatalogFileTool(operation='list', source_uri='master:cat.sch.vol:/') to browse, then ask which to extract.

How to communicate: Summarize the extracted text in plain prose; for long documents quote a few representative lines and report total character count rather than dumping everything.

Example: {source_uri:'master:construction_catalog.construction_schema.construction_documents:/safety_manual.pdf', format:'pdf', page_start:1, page_end:5}.

schema.name: content_base64
schema.description: Raw file bytes encoded as base64 (for binary formats like pdf/docx). Use this when the document isn't yet in AIDP storage. Required unless `content` or `source_uri` is provided. Example: `JVBERi0xLjQKJeLjz9MK...` (truncated PDF header).

schema.name: content
schema.description: Inline plain-text or CSV content passed directly as a string. Use for text/csv/md/json formats when the bytes are already in hand. Required unless `content_base64` or `source_uri` is provided.
examples:
# Project Notes

This document covers the Q3 milestones.

schema.name: source_uri
schema.description: Fully-qualified AIDP URI to read the document from. Preferred input form. Format: `master:<catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/<path>` for catalog volumes or `workspace:/<path>` for the user workspace. Required unless `content` or `content_base64` is provided.

schema.name: dest_uri
schema.description: Optional fully-qualified AIDP URI to write the extracted text (or raw CSV) to. Same URI grammar as `source_uri` (`master:cat.sch.vol:/path` or `workspace:/path`). Write is best-effort: errors surface in the response data and do not fail extraction. Optional; omit to return text only.

schema.name: format
schema.description: Document format. Inferred from `source_uri` or `filename` extension when omitted; defaults to `txt` if nothing else is available. Use `pdf` for PDFs, `docx` for Word, `csv` for spreadsheets, `txt`/`md` for plain text, `json` for JSON.

schema.name: filename
schema.description: Optional original filename used only to infer `format` from the extension when `format` is not explicitly set. Example: `quarterly_report.pdf` would imply `format='pdf'`.

schema.name: page_start
schema.description: PDF only: the first page to extract (1-based, inclusive). Defaults to 1 when omitted. Use to skip front matter or extract a slice of a long PDF. Ignored for non-PDF formats.

schema.name: page_end
schema.description: PDF only: the last page to extract (1-based, inclusive). Defaults to the final page when omitted. Use together with `page_start` to limit extraction to a page range. Ignored for non-PDF formats.

_confDescriptions.max_chars: Cap on extracted text length (characters); output is truncated past this limit.
_confDescriptions.max_csv_rows: Max number of CSV rows to render to text; extra rows are dropped with a truncation marker.
_confDescriptions.max_input_bytes: Max input file size in bytes (decoded from content_base64 or read from source_uri). Default 26214400 (25 MiB).
_confDescriptions.region: OCI region for AIDP file IO (e.g. us-chicago-1). Required when using source_uri / dest_uri with master: URIs. Falls back to OCI_REGION env var.
_confDescriptions.data_lake_ocid: AIDP data lake OCID for file IO. Required when using source_uri / dest_uri with master: URIs. Falls back to DATALAKE_ID env var or context_vars.datalake_id.
_confDescriptions.workspace_id: AIDP workspace ID, required when using source_uri / dest_uri with workspace: URIs.
_confDescriptions.api_version: AIDP API version segment in the base URL. Default 20260430 (do NOT use 20240831 — that path lacks the volume/workspace IO endpoints).
_confDescriptions.service_path: AIDP service path segment in the base URL. Default aiDataPlatforms (do NOT use dataLakes — it lacks the IO endpoints).
_confDescriptions.auth_mode: OCI auth mode for AIDP file IO: resource_principal (default), instance_principal, or user_principal.
_confDescriptions.tenancy_ocid: OCI tenancy OCID. Required when auth_mode is user_principal.
_confDescriptions.user_ocid: OCI user OCID. Required when auth_mode is user_principal.
_confDescriptions.fingerprint: OCI API key fingerprint. Required when auth_mode is user_principal.
_confDescriptions.private_key_content: OCI API private key (PEM). Required when auth_mode is user_principal.
_confDescriptions.pass_phrase: Optional passphrase for the OCI API private key.
_confDescriptions.timeout: HTTP timeout (seconds) for AIDP file IO calls. Default 30.
